name: The White House
subject: What you need to know about entry restrictions
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5fbea510c76690e15eda7d7b6c67d907d3745e19552367889779127d5a2234912efee40305de545eeb4a1be2f4371e004b875fc2d47dca24) The White House • April 26, 2018
## Driving the Day
| • | President Donald J. Trump will welcome service members and veterans to the White House today for the 2018 Wounded Warrior Project Soldier Ride. [Watch live at 10:30 a.m. ET. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5fbea510c76690e1d55364a3fb33f9ba1f03a4e4cb0533453a13c75c3d149d9874f130a222904e618576b0fa6c9af1b1417703a805bc9429)
---|---
• | In honor of Take Our Daughters and Sons to Work Day, Press Secretary Sarah Sanders will hold a mock briefing this morning with children of White House press corps members.
## What you need to know about entry restrictions
**The Supreme Court heard arguments yesterday** about President Trump’s proclamation to limit travel from countries that pose an elevated threat to the United States from terrorism. “This proclamation is about what it says it’s about: foreign policy and national security,” Solicitor General Noel J. Francisco told the justices.
**President Trump’s actions will strengthen America’s screening and vetting**. Last September, the President placed entry restrictions on nationals from certain countries. The proclamation followed an extensive review that determined some countries were not adequately sharing information about their residents with the United States, or they presented other risk factors relevant to national security.
**The President’s top priority is the safety of the American people**. Sensible entry restrictions advance that priority. In fact, following President Trump’s actions, other countries have adopted new security measures that strengthen our ability to properly vet individuals seeking to enter the United States.
[What you need to know about President Trump’s entry restrictions](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5fbea510c76690e16b79998b0ffdc1b45a126fae37603623f0053c382ecd6ac382d24ab05296961a34ddde37c29e53d03e647013f985fc21)

---
|

## Welcoming our wounded warriors
**Returning to civilian life can be difficult for veterans**. Many of our heroes suffer from depression or post-traumatic stress disorder upon discharge—not to mention a variety of physical challenges that can accompany service in the Armed Forces. Resources for this community are essential.
**Fortunately, the Wounded Warrior Project (WWP) is here to help**. WWP’s noble mission is to “honor and empower Wounded Warriors,” connecting them to peers and other opportunities that can smooth the transition from military service. Now in its 15th year, the Soldier Ride is one of WWP’s biggest events.
**Today, President Trump welcomes some of these heroes to the White House**. “Each of you has forged in battle the sacred bonds of loyalty that link our people together,” the President said during last year’s Soldier Ride. “Our country, our values, our very way of life, endures because of you, and it endures because brave Americans raise up in every generation.”
[See photos, and video as President Trump welcomed wounded warriors last year.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5fbea510c76690e1fab1f3b6602a23acdf4107c4ac9cb4a3e1e5f67d020d7cd6f9a80dbf3d6b8f960e3bd642f5d7e3ffb66c1b7d8ce5deef)
**More** : [Watch today’s event live at 10:30 a.m. ET. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5fbea510c76690e1d55364a3fb33f9ba1f03a4e4cb0533453a13c75c3d149d9874f130a222904e618576b0fa6c9af1b1417703a805bc9429)

---
|

subject: Trump's dangerous and erratic economic policies
body:
Dear Activist,

I've had enough of watching the American people suffer thanks to Donald Trump's dangerous and erratic economic policies. I know you have, too.

He's rewarded his wealthy donors with a massive tax cut -- leaving working families struggling -- and stripped healthcare coverage from 13 million people. If his trade war happens, it'll tear a hole in the wallets of Americans from all walks of life.

In far too many ways, we're headed in the wrong direction. Right now, it's time to stop going downhill and start climbing again: That's why we need to impeach this president.

[**Trump 's threatening the middle class, and we need to take action. Add your name to the movement of Americans coming together to demand Congress impeach Donald Trump.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/dYWao/6/S1/r5cs/613Mzt/i0QJ8iYbS/P/P) [](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/dYWao/s/Sf/r5cs/613Mzt/z4xzgRrqhr/P/P) Look, we know Trump has already committed eight impeachable offenses so far. **Enough is enough: We need to remove this dangerous president from office.**

We don't know what he'll do next: Provoke North Korea further? Double down on his obstruction of justice? Further erode our civil liberties?

But here's what I do know: While Congress waits to act, the American people are hurting -- and that's not right.

That's why we need to impeach this president. We must come together and demand Congress act immediately.

[**Add your name today to join our movement for impeachment. Our future depends on it.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/dYWao/v/Sh/r5cs/613Mzt/zWMF2Be8sm/P/P) [](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/dYWao/z/ST/r5cs/613Mzt/zBXmMVRHKu/P/P) Thanks for being a part of this,

Tom Steyer

body:
We don't have a chance of making lasting, long-term progressive change in this country without a strong Democratic Party -- and we certainly won't take back Congress and state legislatures across the
---
Our April fundraising deadline is Monday at midnight. Let me take a moment to tell you why this one is so important, Derek.

We won't have a chance of making lasting, long-term progressive change in this country without a strong Democratic Party. The only way to take back Congress and state legislatures across the country this November is by providing our candidates and state parties with the resources they need to win.

I'm proud of how far we've come in the past year -- but you and I both know our work isn't done.

**We must work together to elect Democrats in all 50 states -- and this critical deadline is the best time for you to make your first contribution of 2018. Chip in $3 now.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522af2/4067b0a/5e0923f95/7e43b98e/1583971089/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180426_tp_nd&source=em_20180426_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180426_tp_nd")

[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522af2/4067b0a/5e0923f95/7e43b98c/1583971089/VEsEAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-deadline-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180426_tp_nd&source=em_20180426_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180426_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522af2/4067b0a/5e0923f95/7e43b98d/1583971089/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180426_tp_nd&source=em_20180426_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180426_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522af2/4067b0a/5e0923f95/7e43b98a/1583971089/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180426_tp_nd&source=em_20180426_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180426_tp_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522af2/4067b0a/5e0923f95/7e43b98b/1583971089/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/april-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180426_tp_nd&source=em_20180426_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180426_tp_nd")
** You know, they say that Rome wasn't built in a day -- well, good campaigns aren't built starting in October. And the work of the Democratic Party won't end when the polls close in November.

We are organizing 365 days a year so that we can take back Congress, win control of state houses, turn governors' mansions blue, and then take back the White House in 2020 to restore some sense of sanity to this country.

Your donation today will not only determine where we land in November -- it will also help shape the future of our party.

**[Step up and make your first donation of 2018. Chip in $3 before Monday's deadline.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522af2/4067b0a/5e0923f95/7e43b988/1583971089/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/april-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+Step+up+if+consinConsGroup29422++again+t&utm_campaign=em_20180426_tp_nd&source=em_20180426_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180426_tp_nd")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Tom

Chair

name: Ben Jealous
subject: [ADD YOUR NAME]: Support my Great Cities Plan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
Friend,
Three years ago, following the death of Freddie Gray, uprisings in our state's largest city showcased the lack of opportunity that exists for far too many families across our urban centers.
From failing schools and gun violence to the opioid epidemic, cities across our state are struggling to be the economic engines they once were. As a result, thousands of Marylanders lack the opportunity to escape poverty. From Baltimore and Salisbury to Cumberland, Marylanders are earning less, and lack the transit options necessary to reach good paying jobs.
**[When we fail to invest in our cities, we are only hurting ourselves. As our cities go, so goes the state. If you believe it's time to reinvest in our cities, add your name in support of my plan today.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7d4/7ab0e2c4/7fa0d9de/349a57a4/453953851/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDQyNjhEIn0=/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/great-cities-plan?source=OHQ04268D")**
In my plan, I propose necessary investments for all of our cities which have experienced chronic underinvestment under this administration. This isn't just a question of fairness, there is talent that we are not taking advantage of, talent we are allowing to languish without proper education, without transportation to access job centers or educational institutions, and we have to change course.
That's why I'll raise the minimum wage to $15 and tie it to inflation. We'll also raise our minority business enterprise target of 29% and increase outreach to ensure that minority and women-owned businesses are also getting the support they need. In a state that's 48.5% minority, and 50% women, 29% isn't a goal; it's a floor. We'll also increase resources to create more affordable housing, end homelessness through rapid rehousing, and fight housing discrimination.
**[My plan will make Maryland safer and will help alleviate the barriers keeping so many Marylanders from opportunity, and will drive investments in our cities to create real economic growth. If you support our plan, add your name here today.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7d4/7ab0e2c4/7fa0d9de/349a57a4/453953851/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDQyNjhEIn0=/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/great-cities-plan?source=OHQ04268D")**
When I'm governor, we'll also make necessary investments like building the Red Line in Baltimore so that the region has the transportation infrastructure it needs to attract, build, and sustain businesses that rely on having a mobile workforce. We'll also invest in the State Center project which will provide an economic boom to the entire Baltimore region.
Together, we can help rebuild our cities and ensure equal opportunity for all Marylanders.
Onward,
Ben Jealous
****[CHIP IN](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7d4/7ab0e2c4/7fa0d9de/349a57a7/453953851/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDQyNjhEIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st4-18?refcode=OHQ04268D")****

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER

Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7d4/7ab0e2c4/7fa0d9de/349a57a1/453953851/VEsD/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. name: Spanberger for Congress
subject: Thank you for your submission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,
Thank you so much for joining our campaign newsletter. I am running because our nation is at an impasse politically. We're seeing a wider gap between parties than at any time in our history, and our current representative, [Dave Brat](https://www.thisamericanlife.org/radio-archives/episode/615/the-beginning-of-now), is adding to this chorus of divisive rhetoric. I want to be a part of the solution that helps Congress return to its core function of serving the people, not partisan agendas. All Americans deserve to have engaged and attentive representatives serving in Washington. I will be that representative for the 7th District.

I have served our country and communities as a federal law enforcement officer and a [CIA operations officer](http://www.elle.com/culture/news/a46527/abigail-spanberger-to-run-against-republican-congressman-dave-brat/). I know how to operate in difficult situations, and I understand the importance of making fully informed decisions. I know what it is to serve the mission of protecting the United States, no matter what party is leading the country. I've done it before and will do it again, if given the honor of serving in Congress.

When I decided to run for this seat, I knew I would need to devote myself fully to being a part of the change I want to see in this world. That is why I'll need every ounce of support that I can get. If you'd like to be a part of this campaign, please...

... [register to volunteer](https://abigailspanberger.com/volunteer/)
... [contribute to our fundraising effort](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/newviaab)
... [like my page on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/SpanbergerForCongress/)
... [follow me on Twitter](https://twitter.com/SpanbergerVA07)

... and ask your friends to do the same!

This is a chance for us to steer the nation in a positive, new direction, and I would love to know that we did it together. Thank you so much for your support.

Sincerely,

Abigail
Contact Information:
Peter Willis
dpwillis67@gmail.com

body:

| | Hello Friend, I made a promise to you that I would not accept a dime in campaign contributions from real estate developers and I have kept my word. It was important to me that my campaign for County Executive was fueled by grassroots support because it is the people of Prince George's I want to serve, not corporate interests. **And with less than 2 months until Election Day, I am still the only candidate in the County Executive 's race who has made and kept this promise to voters.** [**We are 60 days from the June 26 primary and I need at least 4,000 members of the community to make a contribution of $5 or more. Can you help by making a contribution today? **](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff1b/767134fb/5c97261b/43383cbb/1315652371/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/4000fordonna") One of my opponents has accepted over $400,000 from the same old real estate developers -- and their lawyers, lobbyists, contractors, and property management companies -- that have called the shots in Prince George's County for far too long. I believe that working with you, the community is the path to victory -- because our county deserves leaders who will put their needs first. From the very beginning of this campaign, I have been clear: I cannot and will not be bought. I still believe that our community will only thrive with leadership that puts people over profits. My vision for Prince George's County is one where we build safe and sustainable neighborhoods that serve the interests of the people who live and work in them. [**If you support this vision, then I hope you will stand with me as one of 4,000 community members who contribute $5 or more to my campaign today. **](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff1b/767134fb/5c97261b/43383cbb/1315652371/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/4000fordonna") Thank you again for your continued support. Together, we can build a better Prince George's County. Donna

clean_body: | "" | | Hello Friend, I made a promise to you that I would not accept a dime in campaign contributions from real estate developers and I have kept my word. It was important to me that my campaign for County Executive was fueled by grassroots support because it is the people of Prince George's I want to serve, not corporate interests. And with less than 2 months until Election Day, I am still the only candidate in the County Executive 's race who has made and kept this promise to voters. "" One of my opponents has accepted over $400,000 from the same old real estate developers -- and their lawyers, lobbyists, contractors, and property management companies -- that have called the shots in Prince George's County for far too long. I believe that working with you, the community is the path to victory -- because our county deserves leaders who will put their needs first. From the very beginning of this campaign, I have been clear: I cannot and will not be bought. I still believe that our community will only thrive with leadership that puts people over profits. My vision for Prince George's County is one where we build safe and sustainable neighborhoods that serve the interests of the people who live and work in them. "" Thank you again for your continued support. Together, we can build a better Prince George's County. Donna | "" "" "" Authority: Donna for Prince George's, Glenn Ivey, Treasurer P.O. Box 44343 Fort Washington, MD 20749 ""

subject: Hey, Andrew gets it
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30c9/9e00690/44aecfeb/2402628a/3842178474/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180426_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__GB&source=em18_180426_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__GB")
Friends --

Andrew Gillum doesn't have a famous last name. He doesn't have the ability to write this campaign a seven-figure check. And he didn't get into this race because he "ran out of other things to do."

Andrew is running to be Florida's next Governor because people like us deserve a voice in our government again. But the gun lobby isn't going to stand by quietly.

With the NRA just announcing they broke a 15-year fundraising record, they're going to have a bigger war chest to talk to their supporters in races around the country, including ours. Andrew's already won battles against them (twice), and he'll do whatever it takes to keep our communities safe. He's already taken the No NRA Money pledge -- but he'll need your help to make sure Floridians have a real candidate in this election who hasn't been bought.

**[We have a major deadline coming up and we need your help to hit our $10,000 goal. Can we count on you to chip in $5 before our end-of-month deadline on Monday and help us meet our goal?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30c9/9e00690/44aecfeb/2402628d/3842178474/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-april-eom?gpsid=13_55_89&refcode=em18_180426_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__GB&utm_campaign=em18_180426_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__GB&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+We+have+a+major+deadline+coming+up+and+w")**

We're building this campaign from the ground up, listing to Floridians and working together to elect a leader who will value the voices of the people, not special interests or wealthy corporations -- and prioritize our communities.

Together, we can put a courageous leader in the Governor's Mansion who understands what working Floridians need and show everyone a true people-powered campaign can win.

**[So please, chip in $5 now and help us hit our end-of-month goal.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30c9/9e00690/44aecfeb/2402628c/3842178474/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-april-eom?gpsid=13_55_89&refcode=em18_180426_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__GB&utm_campaign=em18_180426_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__GB&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+So+please+chip+in++ask++now+and+help+us+")**

Thank you,

Geoff Burgan

That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1eb44babdded44d49a765697948d3bdc&_e=n8lsrOsriITjEfZ9h9W9F_201S4V8QL57-Skal2tpSl19s3BuKkw4dQ-_bYFV9GsUVj_4t5G9lP6_6qwZDW8Eycu8t8V7y4-nOJP_GSXUBdam2vVWqCABlsqBliu6yg2VKzdKbGOtckRflRv2XEiV42PJ-AfwhaNMvUqRwf3vKKgWgAtq86vlOktUvyI41hFQMK7AQT9-12zSaNObpategfBVsd1rr4fQUFk-ATIXdhDmd1ArCd8iQVKEyoZ6iXvnnROUD1Y41ObjdB5J-l5Ca8gEckGnAqQ3o085Gag02R-kCHe9-GliV_M2KvIR0oC1I4J3z8SE1vsnmFJtM-tmzfvs0Avx2BSs4Qa2qOtCyAy6B5ZBXDW2QLSZAhyQfgw) that you care about? | | Here's a list of things the EPA administrator should do:
* Believe in climate change.
* Hold polluters in the fossil fuel industry accountable.
* Take steps to clean up the environment, keep our air clean, and keep our water safe.

Scott Pruitt has done none of those things. You know what he has done?
* Denied climate change.
* Hired fossil fuel industry insiders.
* Wasted taxpayer dollars for personal gain.

**Pruitt is unworthy of the position he holds.** The American people deserve better. Especially families in Florida, who live directly in the damage path of increasingly severe storms and rising coastal waters. [_**I believe Scott Pruitt should resign. Add your name if you 're with me.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ffe/622b7b5b/1a7819e5/307b8783/3453415563/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180425") Debbie

name: Sen. Kamala Harris (via DSCC)
subject: what we could lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
There are eleven Democratic Senate women facing re-election this year -- half of all the women in the Senate. If we don't stand with them, we would lose some of our most powerful champions, not to mention any chance of taking back the Senate majority.
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018a?refcode=DPE-20180426-Harris-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Dear friend,

Every day, I go to work alongside tough, brilliant, fearless leaders like Elizabeth Warren, Claire McCaskill, and Tammy Baldwin.

**We come from different states, and we bring different life experiences to the table, but we stand united in always fighting for what 's right, even when the politics are difficult.**

Every day, Republicans are breaking our nation's commitment to a fairer economy and a more just society, which is exactly why Democratic women are at the top of their target list this year.

**There are eleven Democratic Senate women facing re-election this year -- half of all the women in the Senate.** If we don't stand with them, we would lose some of our most powerful champions, not to mention any chance of taking back the Senate majority.

[**That 's why I'm asking you to chip in $1 right now to help the Women's Senate Network stand strong in the face of right-wing attacks and win the tough fights this November.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018a?refcode=DPE-20180426-Harris-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Make no mistake: This won't be easy. Republican mega-donors like the Koch brothers have pledged more than $400 million in super PAC attacks before November.

Those vicious ads won't scare us away from standing up for what we believe in. But the sad truth is, they can work if we aren't ready to fight back.

**Many of the women won their races by the slimmest of margins -- my friend Maggie Hassan from New Hampshire won hers by a little over 1,000 votes.**

And the truth is, without a strong grassroots organization backing us up, these dark money attacks could easily tip those kinds of close races.

[**The Women 's Senate Network is that grassroots organization -- and support from people like you is the only way we can build it strong enough to win in November. Click here to donate $1 right now.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018a?refcode=DPE-20180426-Harris-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

name: Team Cooper
subject: FW: This isn't good enough.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
| Hello,

I just wanted to make sure you saw this note from Roy yesterday.

The latest teacher pay ranking -- 37th in the country -- is just not good enough for North Carolina.

**[Our teachers deserve better than this. Join Roy today and add your name to support our teachers.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120349d/2fde7c66/461095fd/1569cd70/666226574/VEsH/ "https://cooper.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-our-teachers?gpsid=29_43_74&source=em18_180426_edupay2_adv_gq_ful__&utm_campaign=em18_180426_edupay2_adv_gq_ful__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&utm_content=1+-+Our+teachers+deserve+better+than+this+Jo")**

Team Cooper

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Roy Cooper (info@roycooper.com)
Date: Wed, Apr 25, 2018 at 5:21 PM
Subject: This isn't good enough
---

[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120349d/2fde7c66/461095fd/1569cd73/666226574/VEsE/ "https://cooper.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-our-teachers?gpsid=29_43_74&source=em18_180426_edupay2_adv_gq_ful__&utm_campaign=em18_180426_edupay2_adv_gq_ful__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&utm_content=2")
Hello,

The new teacher pay rankings are out -- and they aren't good enough for North Carolina. We come in at 37th in the country in average teacher pay.

That is unacceptable.

Our teachers are working second jobs and some of our best are leaving our state and even the profession because of a lack of pay and respect from Republican legislative leaders.

Last year I proposed a budget that would get teacher pay to at least the national average in 5 years. But Republican leaders only passed smaller raises and left most veteran teachers out altogether.

[**Enough is enough. Add your name here to join me in calling on Republicans in the legislature to fund more teacher pay raises.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120349d/2fde7c66/461095fd/1569cd72/666226574/VEsF/ "https://cooper.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-our-teachers?gpsid=29_43_74&source=em18_180426_edupay2_adv_gq_ful__&utm_campaign=em18_180426_edupay2_adv_gq_ful__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&utm_content=3+-+Enough+is+enough+Add+your+name+here+to+j")

In 2014, Republican legislative leaders claimed that their teacher pay plan would move North Carolina to 32nd nationally for teacher pay.

That did not happen. And they continue to fall far short when it comes to giving teachers decent raises.

As governor, I spend a lot of time in our public schools. I know how hard our teachers are working. I know how much they care. I see it in every classroom I visit.

They deserve better than this.

[**Add your name here.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120349d/2fde7c66/461095fd/1569cd75/666226574/VEsC/ "https://cooper.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-our-teachers?gpsid=29_43_74&source=em18_180426_edupay2_adv_gq_ful__&utm_campaign=em18_180426_edupay2_adv_gq_ful__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name+here")

Thanks for your support on this crucial issue,

Roy | | [**Add your name ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120349d/2fde7c66/461095fd/1569cd74/666226574/VEsD/ "https://cooper.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-our-teachers?gpsid=29_43_74&source=em18_180426_edupay2_adv_gq_ful__&utm_campaign=em18_180426_edupay2_adv_gq_ful__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&utm_content=5+-+Add+your+name+rarr")
---

Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: Stop Republicans from rigging the census >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf67/2a380d31/b22c5f8/f18f1d/672660305/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf67/2a380d31/b22c5f8/f18f1d/672660305/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Team --
Since our founding, America has undergone a massive headcount every decade. The census then shapes up the playing field for the country for the decade to come.
**The 2020 census results will have an enormous impact on a number of important decisions -- namely, the makeup of Congress.**
Unfortunately, the Trump administration's plan will undercount minority, immigrant, and LGBTQ people. [**If you believe that this is unacceptable and that EVERY American must be counted, please sign our petition calling for a fair and representative census.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf67/2a380d31/b22c5f8/f18f1e/672660305/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/2020census/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_2020census_up%3Frefcode%3De20180426_2020censusja_up")
It's not just representation in Congress that the census impacts. Funding for public roads, schools, hospitals, and more are all also determined in part by the census. Undercounting any Granite Stater -- or American -- would put them and their families at an unfair disadvantage.
Decisions made as a result of this census will have implications for decades to come, and it's no coincidence that the communities the Trump administration's plan would sell short have a history of supporting Democrats.
[**Please sign our petition urging the Trump administration not to marginalize communities and to fairly count every single American in the census.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf67/2a380d31/b22c5f8/f18f1e/672660305/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/2020census/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_2020census_up%3Frefcode%3De20180426_2020censusja_up")

Decisions made as a result of this census will have implications for decades to come, and it's no coincidence that the communities the Trump administration's plan would sell short have a history of supporting Democrats. "" Thank you for taking action, Team Maggie ""
